ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "second_name" TEXT /* Second name of the player */,
  "team_code" INTEGER /* Code of the team the player belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Detailed injury status of the player */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the team expires */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Specific position of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_code FOREIGN KEY ("team_code") REFERENCES teams ("team_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_code" INTEGER /* Code of the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "strength_overall_home" REAL /* Overall strength of the team at home */,
  "strength_overall_away" REAL /* Overall strength of the team away */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "manager_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the team's manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "opp_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "was_home" INTEGER /* Whether the match was played at home or away */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opp_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opp_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents involving the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "strength_overall_home" REAL /* Overall strength of the team at home */,
  "strength_overall_away" REAL /* Overall strength of the team away */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets kept by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the team */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the team */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the team */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the team */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents involving the team */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks taken by the team */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded by the team */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
